zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington於1090年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾素德勒時，他的父親Harold de Sudeley34歲，母親Maud d'Chester19歲。他於1129年與Grace de Tracy在英國格盧斯特斯爾素德勒結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1140年在他的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington于1090年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾素德勒时，他的父亲Harold de Sudeley34岁，母亲Maud d'Chester19岁。他于1129年与Grace de Tracy在英国格盧斯特斯爾素德勒结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1140年在他的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sudeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Sudeley (Gloucs) or Soudley in East Dean (Gloucs).

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington was born in 1090, in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Harold de Sudeley, was 34 and his mother, Maud d'Chester, was 19. He married Grace de Tracy in 1129, in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died about 1140, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington est né en 1090, à Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Harold de Sudeley, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Maud d'Chester, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Grace de Tracy en 1129, à Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé environ 1140, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington 1090 in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Harold de Sudeley 34 und seine Mutter Maud d'Chester 19. Er hat 1129 in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England Grace de Tracy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb um 1140 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington è nato il nel 1090 nel Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Harold de Sudeley, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Maud d'Chester, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Grace de Tracy nel 1129, nel Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì circa 1140, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddingtonが1090年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスデリーで生まれた時，父Harold de Sudeleyは34歳，母Maud d'Chesterは19歳であった。1129年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスデリーでGrace de Tracyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は約1140年に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington(이)가 1090년 영국 그루스스터실르 수데리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Harold de Sudeley(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud d'Chester(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1129년 영국 그루스스터실르 수데리에서 Grace de Tracy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1140년 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington nasceu em 1090, em Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Harold de Sudeley, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Maud d'Chester, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Grace de Tracy em 1129, em Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1140, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington родился в 1090 г. в местности судели, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Harold de Sudeley было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Maud d'Chester, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Grace de Tracy в 1129 г. в местности судели, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер около 1140 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Sudeley Lord of Sudeley and Toddington nació en 1090, en Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Harold de Sudeley, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Maud d'Chester, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Grace de Tracy en 1129, en Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1140, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
